title: Finish, Dishwasher Salt, 2kg, Prevents Limescale and White Residue, Effective Against Hard Water, for Cleaner and Shinier Dishes vs Dishwasher Tablets Alone
features: Finish Salt is specifically made for dishwashers to soften water and protect them from the negative effects of hard water which can reduce the efficiency of your dishwasher
Eliminates limescale residues and stubborn white marks on your dishes
Thanks to its high purity of 99%, Finish Salt gives your dishwasher better protection from limescale residues
This is recommended over normal table salts which may contain contaminants that can damage your dishwasher
Finish is trusted by leading dishwasher brands like Bosch, Hisense, Siemens, Neff, and Smeg, ensuring reliable results with every wash
description: Product Description For my dishwasher, I choose the Finish efficiency! Finish is expert in dishwasher detergents and has a long history of innovations. Founded in 1953, the Finish brand has specialised in automatic dishwasher products for 60 years. Say Goodbye to Hard Water Marks with Finish Dishwasher Salt Formulated to Enhance Dishwasher Performance and Keep Dishes Sparkling Clean Struggling with stubborn white marks from hard water on your dishes? Discover the solution with Finish Dishwasher Salt! Formulated to combat hard water issues, it ensures your dishwasher runs efficiently and your dishes come out sparkling clean. Finish Dishwasher Salt helps your dishwasher perform better and avoids unsightly residues. Ideal for dishwashers and water softeners, Finish Dishwasher Salt tackles hard water problems and ensures pristine results. Eliminates stubborn white marks Combats hard water issues Ensures efficient dishwasher operation Prevents unsightly white residues Suitable for dishwashers and softeners Protect Your Dishwasher & Enhance Cleanliness with Finish Salt! Prevents Lime Scale Effectively protects vital dishwasher components from limescale buildup, significantly extending the lifespan of your appliance for years of reliable performance. Improves Water Softening Ensures your dishwasher operates efficiently and reliably, delivering the best wash results for sparkling clean dishes every time. 99% purity Formulated with high-grade sodium chloride for superior performance and optimal cleaning results. Complete machine cleaner. Machine cleaner during the cycle. Rinse liquid Protector. Air freshener Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 124 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,019 4.7 out of 5 stars 392 — — Price £9.50 £ 9 . 50 — no data — no data — no data — no data Several problems Grease and limescale build up in the non-visible parts of your dishwasher. My dishwasher is dirty than it looks: grease, limescale and bad odours are accumulating. My dishes are wet and water leaves marks on my dishes and glasses. My glasses whiten and my dishes tarnish My dishwasher keeps bad odours The finishing solution. Cleans deeply even non-visible parts Cleans your machine even in short cycle and at low temperatures Dries your dishes for optimal results without streaks Protects the shine of your glasses Eliminates odours from your dishwasher and ensures a fresh scent Recommended use. Use once every 3 months during a vacuum wash cycle. Use once a month in a normal wash cycle. Fill the reservoir with rinsing fluid regularly Attaches to the lower basket of the dishwasher and use every time. To be attached to the dishwasher basket and used with every wash.
